what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a board item via a board:// URI, within the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: It is a typed cross-reference between a channel memory attachment and a board item
It contains only metadata, with no prose, code, or payload
conventions: Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added
Target uses a board:// URI scheme
concerns: No descriptive context about why the attachment exists or what it represents
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that records a link from the dragnet-development channel to board item item-64466290.
questions: What is the semantic relationship between this attachment and the target board item?
What discussion or content does this attachment capture?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment metadata record matches the content; it is a minimal link record with no additional payload.
intention_signals: It appears intended to catalog or preserve a reference association between a specific board item and the dragnet-development channel's memory store.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed association between a channel attachment and a board item, which a fused system could keep as a provenance or linkage record.
